releaseNotes:
🚀 Major Update v1.1.2 — Smart Automation + Cloud Control

🔥 Core Features:
• Advanced USSD execution can now run while the screen is off
• Data plans can now be imported using a link or a file
• Online buy-for-another-number portal is now fully working
• Hybrid connection now supports linking two phones together from Hybrid to Controller
• Online phone monitoring now supports realtime live streaming

⚡ Performance Improvements:
• Smoother transaction execution
• Faster and more stable USSD flow handling
• Improved remote phone monitoring and sync feedback

🧹 System Improvements:
• Reduced noisy logs
• Cleaner transaction states
• Better cloud activity visibility
• Improved overall automation reliability

✅ Overall: More powerful remote control, smoother transactions, cleaner logs, and realtime online monitoring.
